allow: Bash(node -e "import\('@getbrevo/brevo'\).then\(m => { const b = m.Brevo; console.log\(typeof b\); console.log\(Object.keys\(b || {}\).slice\(0,20\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('@getbrevo/brevo'\).then\(m => { const keys = Object.keys\(m.Brevo\); const emailKeys = keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('email'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('transac'\)\); console.log\(emailKeys\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('@getbrevo/brevo'\).then\(m => { const te = m.Brevo.transactionalEmails; console.log\(typeof te\); console.log\(te\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('@getbrevo/brevo'\).then\(m => { const { BrevoClient, BrevoEnvironment } = m; console.log\(typeof BrevoClient\); const c = new BrevoClient\({ apiKey: 'test', environment: BrevoEnvironment.Production }\); console.log\(Object.keys\(c\).slice\(0,20\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('@getbrevo/brevo'\).then\(m => { const { BrevoClient, BrevoEnvironment } = m; const c = new BrevoClient\({ apiKey: 'test', environment: BrevoEnvironment.Production }\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(c\)\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('@getbrevo/brevo'\).then\(m => { const { BrevoClient, BrevoEnvironment } = m; const c = new BrevoClient\({ apiKey: 'test', environment: BrevoEnvironment.Production }\); const te = c.transactionalEmails; console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(te\)\)\); }\)")
